title: dryopteris affinis var. cristata
intro: Dryopteris affinis var. cristata, also known as the golden spleenwort or cristate wood fern, is a variety of the Dryopteris affinis plant, a type of evergreen fern native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris affinis var. cristata include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
